goal: Add provider-specific YouTube credential deployment wiring boundaries and production observability metric contracts without committing secrets or claiming production readiness.
authOracle: Production official YouTube connector rejects local_env credential source and requires secret_manager with a secret name; credential provider tests verify resolver-only secret retrieval.
apiCompatibilitySummary: Public API unchanged; internal YouTube credential provider and operations helper surfaces are additive; no breaking runtime route changes.
splitReason: Provider-specific secret manager SDK, real dashboard exporter, alert delivery, and live YouTube account operation are split out to deployment/runtime PRs to avoid mixing boundary contracts with production operation.
reasoningEvidence: Plan-first scope separates credential source validation, secret resolver boundary, metrics contract, manual live soak gate, docs, and quality evidence.
verificationOracle: Local typecheck and tests verify credential provider boundaries plus YouTube observability metric mapping; GitHub CI and quality-gate verify current head.
storageOracle: No DB migration or storage format change in this PR.
releaseGateOracle: This PR advances G3 partial operations readiness only and does not claim G4 production readiness.
